title: Prestige Inspire Bakeware Oven Tray - Black,39 cm
features: CUSHION SMART NON STICK TECHNOLOGY - Carbon steel oven tray with Cushion Smart non stick surface ensuring better air circulating for consistent browning and easier release

DURABLE CARBON STEEL - This large Prestige oven tray is made of heavy gauge carbon steel for long lasting performance, allowing heat to be distributed more evenly for perfect cooking results every time
FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE - Unleash your creativity in the kitchen. You can store Prestige non stick oven tray safely both in your refrigerator and in your freezer if needed
OVEN AND DISHWASHER SAFE - You can use this multipurpose oven tray in the oven up to 240C/gas mark 9. It is also dishwasher safe to save you time cleaning up
25 YEAR GUARANTEE - Prestige are so confident in the quality and durability of this metal oven tray, it comes with a 25 year guarantee for your complete peace of mind
description: From the manufacturer Prestige - Inspire The superior choice for bakers everywhere From cupcakes to homebaked bread, our Inspire ramge has everything the home cook could dream of. Cushion Smart Technology CushionSmart provides a triple benefit to baking. The cushioned surface enables air to flow around food to create better browning and aids the non-stick performance as low lying areas are protected from utensil abrasion enabling superior food release for longer. Cushion smart Superior non-stick Dishwasher safe Oven safe Suitable for freezing Long lasting performance Cushion Smart Technology* Non-stick Cushioned Smart interior provides better browning and easier release. *Not available on all products. Suitable for Freezing Freeze all your creations to enjoy them later on with your loved ones or alone. Dishwasher Safe *Most of our Inspire range is dishwasher safe,so just put it in the dishwasher, relax and enjoy some quality time with your family. Oven Safe Our Inspire Bakeware range is oven safe up to 240C. Our products all have features designed to save you some time, stress and effort - we help you more in the kitchen, so you can get on with your life. Do you love to bake ? Try us ! Roast potatoes, butterfly cakes, roast chicken, blueberry breakfast muffins; some of the most universal family favourites rely on quality roasters and bakeware for delicious results every time. With the Prestige collection, you’ll never have to worry about your little one being disappointed when their baking efforts end up stuck to the sides of the cake tin, as all our roasters and bakeware are non-stick for easier release and happy, proud bakers, every time.
